summary: Classified the five live-inventory PRs independently. No security-sensitive signal was present, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is allowed or safe from this job. Each open PR has an explicit maintainer, proof, author-followup, or technical-correctness gate, so the result keeps the inventory non-mutating and scopes human review to the exact PR decisions.

actions.reason: Needs maintainer decision/proof follow-up before any merge path; no close or replacement action is permitted in this job.
Ready-looking contributor fix requires maintainer review of persisted repair behavior; the worker cannot merge or repair it.
Needs real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the exported helper behavior change; failing proof blocks any fixed-by-candidate or merge-style outcome.
Needs maintainer acceptance of persisted native transcript mutation behavior; no merge or fix action is allowed in this inventory job.
Needs author changes and maintainer technical review; failing lint blocks any merge-style or fixed-by-candidate outcome.

needs_human: #84680: maintainer-labeled Codex behavior guidance needs real behavior proof and maintainer decision.
#84708: persisted session repair PR is proof-sufficient but needs maintainer review of durable JSONL repair behavior.
#84719: focused webhook limiter fix has failing Real behavior proof and public SDK behavior semantics that need acceptance.
#84728: Codex rollout transcript repair is proof-sufficient but needs maintainer acceptance of automatic persisted transcript mutation.
#90776: author follow-up is needed for lint/review findings before maintainer review can continue.
